title: `query` table function fails on "Single SELECT statement"
description:
### What happens?

```sql
FROM query('SELECT * FROM (PIVOT (SELECT 1 AS col) ON col using first(col))');
```
```
 Expected a single SELECT statement
```

Since I *am* passing a single `SELECT` statement to `query`, either the error message needs fixing or the functionality needs fixing.

### To Reproduce

.

Linux

### DuckDB Version:

1.4

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, NULL), (3, 'example');
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS filtered;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table GROUP BY value, id HAVING value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) FROM test_table WHERE id > 0;
key_bug_features: query function fails with single SELECT statement
